chunks.title: Introduction to King Joash
chunks.reason: Establishes the reign and religious context of Joash.

chunks.title: Joash Orders Temple Repairs
chunks.reason: Contains dialogue regarding the collection and use of funds for repairs.

chunks.title: Temple Fund Collection and Use
chunks.reason: Describes the mechanism of collection and the faithful expenditure on repairs.

chunks.title: War with Hazael and Tribute
chunks.reason: Narrates the threat from Aram and Joash's payment to secure peace.

chunks.title: Death and Succession of Joash
chunks.reason: Details the conspiracy against Joash and the rise of his son Amaziah.
